title: Fix Reminders panel overlap and color contrast issues

requirements.text: Reposition the Reminders dropdown panel so it does not overlap the Export button or the date filter buttons (This Week, This Month, Custom). The panel should open below the notification bell icon without covering any toolbar elements, ensuring proper z-index layering and positioning so all toolbar controls remain fully visible and accessible when the Reminders panel is open.

quotes: Reminders is merging please look into the image and rectify
the Reminders dropdown is covering the Export button and date filter buttons (This Week, This Month, Custom) in the top-right area

acceptanceCriteria: The Reminders dropdown panel does not overlap the Export button when open
The Reminders dropdown panel does not overlap the This Week, This Month, and Custom date filter buttons when open
The Reminders panel is positioned so it opens fully visible without clipping other toolbar elements
All toolbar controls (Export, date filters) remain clickable when Reminders panel is open

requirements.text: Fix color contrast issues across the entire application. Specifically: (1) The 'Done' column header currently has a very dark green background — ensure the header text and icon are clearly readable against it. (2) Task cards in all columns must have sufficient contrast between card background and body text, assignee names, and date text. (3) Status badge text (To Do, In Progress, Done) must contrast clearly against their badge background colors. (4) Column header badges (task count circles) must have readable text on their background. (5) All body text throughout the app must meet a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against its background. Avoid pairing similarly dark or similarly light colors for text and background.

quotes: color formating of font and bg should be contrast not the same
the 'Done' column has a dark green background with low-contrast text, and several other elements (cards, badges, headers) need better contrast

acceptanceCriteria: The Done column header text and icon are clearly legible against the dark green background
Task card body text (title, description, assignee, date) has strong contrast against the card background in all columns
Status badge labels (To Do, In Progress, Done) are clearly readable — text color contrasts sufficiently with badge background
Column count badges show readable numerals against their background
No text-on-background pairing in the app uses the same or near-identical hue/lightness for both
Contrast ratio for all body text meets at least 4.5:1 against its direct background

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or any backend logic
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the overall dark theme of the application
Modifying backend task data or status logic
